extensionDescription.message: Translate web pages using multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic (Claude), Gemini, Ollama)

contextMenuTranslateSelection.description: Context menu title for translating selected text

contextMenuTranslatePage.description: Context menu title for translating the current page

notificationOpeningSettings.message: No provider is enabled. Opening settings.
notificationOpeningSettings.description: Notification shown when context menu translate-page is invoked but no provider is enabled

selectionPopupTitle.description: Title of the dedicated selection translation popup

labelSelectionSource.description: Label for source language in selection popup

labelSelectionTarget.description: Label for target language in selection popup

labelSelectionProvider.description: Label for provider name in selection popup

statusFoundBlocks.description: Status message when blocks are found

statusCompleted.description: Status message when translation is completed

statusCompletedWithErrors.description: Status message when translation is completed with errors

statusCancelled.description: Status message when translation is cancelled by the user

errorFailedToInitialize.description: Error message when popup initialization fails

errorPleaseSelectProvider.description: Error message when no provider is selected

errorNoEnabledProviders.message: No enabled providers found. Please enable one in Settings.
errorNoEnabledProviders.description: Error when no providers are available for translation

errorNoSelectionText.message: Select text on the page before translating.
errorNoSelectionText.description: Error shown when no text is selected for translation

statusSelectionPreparing.description: Status shown before selection translation starts

statusSelectionPopupOpened.description: Status message after showing the inline selection overlay

errorTranslationFailed.message: Translation failed. Please check provider settings.

statusPageTranslationStarted.description: Status message when page translation starts

errorTranslationFailedWithMessage.description: Error message when translation fails with specific message

statusOriginalContentRestored.description: Status message when original content is restored

errorRestoreFailedWithMessage.description: Error message when restore fails with specific message

errorNoRegularWebPage.message: No regular web page is focused. Please click the page you want to translate and try again.
errorNoRegularWebPage.description: Error message when no regular web page is focused

errorScriptPathMissing.message: Translator script path is missing from manifest.
errorScriptPathMissing.description: Error message when script path is missing

errorPageBlocksExtensions.message: This page does not allow extensions (e.g. chrome:// or the Web Store). Please try another page or reload after enabling the extension.
errorPageBlocksExtensions.description: Error message when page blocks extensions

errorTranslatorCouldNotLoad.message: Translator could not load on this page yet. Please reload the tab and try again.
errorTranslatorCouldNotLoad.description: Error message when translator could not load

errorRuntimeNotSupported.message: Runtime does not support script injection APIs.
errorRuntimeNotSupported.description: Error message when runtime does not support script injection

errorNoTranslatableText.message: No translatable text found on this page.
errorNoTranslatableText.description: Error message when no translatable text is found

errorProviderNotEnabled.description: Error message when provider is not enabled

errorNoActiveTab.description: Error message when no active tab is available

statusFailedToLoadSettings.description: Error shown when settings cannot be loaded

statusSettingsSaved.description: Confirmation shown after settings are saved

statusFailedToSaveSettings.description: Error shown when settings cannot be saved

confirmResetSettings.message: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?

statusFailedToResetSettings.description: Error shown when settings cannot be reset

statusFailedToExportSettings.description: Error shown when settings cannot be exported

statusFailedToImportSettings.description: Error shown when settings cannot be imported

statusFetchingModels.description: Status shown while fetching models from a provider

statusNoModelsFound.message: No models found. Please enter a model manually.
statusNoModelsFound.description: Status shown when no models are returned from a provider

statusFailedToFetchModels.description: Error shown when models cannot be fetched

labelEnableProvider.description: Accessible label for the per-provider enable toggle

labelToggleVisibility.description: Accessible label for the password visibility toggle

labelOptional.description: Suffix shown after a field label when the field is optional

languageAutoDetect.description: Source language option meaning automatic detection

popupHelperEnableProvider.description: Helper text shown in the popup provider selector when no providers are enabled

errorNoAccessibleTab.description: Error shown when the popup cannot find an accessible tab

errorInvalidSettingsJson.description: Error shown when imported settings JSON is invalid

errorAPIKeyRequiredForModels.message: $PROVIDER$ API key is required to fetch models.
errorAPIKeyRequiredForModels.description: Error shown when an API key is missing for fetching models

errorBaseURLRequiredForModels.message: Base URL is required to fetch models from $PROVIDER$ providers.
errorBaseURLRequiredForModels.description: Error shown when a base URL is missing for fetching models
